title: Functional TFC
description: Add Drawers for TFC Wood Types
body:
![Functional TFC Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121-Mods/Functional-TFC/master/Functional%20TFC%20Logo.png)
Functional TFC add Functional Storage Drawers for TFC Wood Types.

Drawers made from tfc wood do not have the same crafting recipe(use lumber instead of planks).

Support AFC(arborfirmacraft) Wood Types IF installed.

[![Kinecic Hosting banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mrthomas20121/Branding/master/KineticHosting.png) ](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=540)
